sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10214" key="a)ntinomoqete/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντινομοθετέω</orth>, <sense id="n10214.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make laws in rivalry with,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1044c</biblScope></bibl></cit>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
